case_title: MICHELLE LUGO VS. CHELSEA LYNN MILLER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUGO, MICHELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MILLER, CHELSEA LYNN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, CHELSEA LYNN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,315.00 FILED BY LUGO, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, CHELSEA LYNN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
